underlying_goal: Execute the gsdr:plan-phase workflow for phase 57.4 (Audit Skill & Investigatory Type) to produce verified executable phase plans
friction_detail: Claude launched the wrong subagent type (general-purpose instead of gsdr-planner), then deleted rather than archived the killed agent's partial output, requiring user interruption and correction.
brief_summary: User invoked the gsdr:plan-phase workflow for phase 57.4; Claude completed it with 6 verified plans but had to be interrupted to fix wrong-agent selection and improper deletion of failed-agent artifacts.
